title: Withered Foxy Jumpscare
description: 1/10000 Chance for Withered Foxy Jumpscare Every Second
body:
This mod makes it so that every second, there is a 1/10000 chance for you to be jumpscared by Withered Foxy from FNAF 2, menus included.

There is also a 1/4 chance that Withered Foxy will be replaced by Mangle.

<details>
<summary>Only applies to the 1.0 version</summary>
This does entirely block your inputs while the jumpscare is active for around half a second, but it does pause the game in singleplayer (only for the duration of the jumpscare, this WILL unpause your game if it is paused already).
</details>

This mod was directly inspired by the Terraria mod "1/10000 Chance for Withered Foxy Jumpscare Every Second".
